# query

Server-rendered Next.js route (`/query`) mounting the agentic code assistant interface. Combines question input, streaming answer generation with citations, and status indication into a single-page query experience.

## Contents

- **[layout.tsx](./layout.tsx)** — Exports `metadata` (page title "Ask a Question | Zeee Pitch Zooo") and `QueryLayout` pass-through wrapper.
- **[page.tsx](./page.tsx)** — `QueryPage` client component orchestrating `QueryInput`, `QueryStatusIndicator`, `StreamingAnswer`, `CitationList` via `useQueryStream()` hook.

## Component Orchestration

`page.tsx` consumes `useQueryStream()` state (`{ answer, status, citations, error, askQuestion }`) and distributes it to child components:

- `QueryInput` receives `onSubmit={askQuestion}`, `disabled={isProcessing}` (derived from `status === "retrieving" || status === "generating"`)
- `QueryStatusIndicator` displays `status` enum ("retrieving" | "generating" | "done" | etc.)
- `StreamingAnswer` renders `answer`, `status`, `error` during generation
- `CitationList` conditionally rendered when `status === "done" && citations.length > 0`, `open={true}` default

## Integration Points

- **`../../hooks/use-query-stream.ts`** — provides streaming state machine for query execution
- **`../../components/query/query-input.tsx`** — question input component
- **`../../components/query/query-status.tsx`** — status indicator UI
- **`../../components/query/streaming-answer.tsx`** — markdown streaming renderer
- **`../../components/query/citation-list.tsx`** — collapsible citation display
